requirement_topic.en: EMC — Emissions and Immunity for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——光伏逆变器骚扰发射与抗扰度
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——光伏逆變器騷擾發射與抗擾度

summary.en: Myanmar has no mandatory horizontal EMC directive equivalent to the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. MSTRD (Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division, Ministry of Science and Technology) adopts IEC-aligned voluntary standards for electrical equipment, but no published mandatory EMC product regulation specifically covering PV inverters has been identified as of the access date. MPT (Myanmar Posts and Telecommunications) regulates radio-frequency emissions for equipment with intentional transmitters; PV inverters without wireless modules are outside MPT scope. In practice, importers of commercial PV inverters may be asked to provide IEC 61000-series EMC test reports as supporting documentation for MIC import permits or for MEPE/ESE grid-interconnection review, but this is procedural rather than a statutory mandatory requirement.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有与EU EMC指令2014/30/EU等同的强制性横向EMC指令。MSTRD（缅甸科技部标准与检测研究司）针对电气设备采用与IEC接轨的自愿性标准，但截至查询日期，尚未发现专门针对光伏逆变器的已发布强制性EMC产品法规。MPT（缅甸邮政与电信局）对含有意发射器设备的射频发射进行监管；不含无线模块的光伏逆变器不在MPT管辖范围内。实践中，商业光伏逆变器进口商在申请MIC进口许可或MEPE/ESE并网审查时，可能被要求提供IEC 61000系列EMC测试报告作为支持文件，但这属于程序性要求，而非法定强制要求。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有與EU EMC指令2014/30/EU等同的強制性橫向EMC指令。MSTRD（緬甸科技部標準與檢測研究司）針對電氣設備採用與IEC接軌的自願性標準，但截至查詢日期，尚未發現專門針對光伏逆變器的已發布強制性EMC產品法規。MPT（緬甸郵政與電信局）對含有意發射器設備的射頻發射進行監管；不含無線模組的光伏逆變器不在MPT管轄範圍內。實踐中，商業光伏逆變器進口商在申請MIC進口許可或MEPE/ESE並網審查時，可能被要求提供IEC 61000系列EMC測試報告作為支持文件，但這屬於程序性要求，而非法定強制要求。

standards_or_laws: MSTRD voluntary standards (IEC-aligned, non-exhaustive — verify current catalogue with MSTRD)
MPT radio-frequency emission rules (applies to intentional transmitters only)

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC standards for PV inverters include GB 17799.4-2022 (conducted and radiated emissions, industrial environment, IDT IEC 61000-6-4:2018) and GB/T 17799.2-2023 (immunity, industrial environment, IDT IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020). These are administered by SAMR and form part of the CQC/CGC voluntary certification baseline. Because Myanmar recognises IEC-based test reports as supporting evidence, the existing Chinese IEC 61000-series test reports obtained for domestic CQC/CGC certification carry practical value for Myanmar import documentation, even though no mutual-recognition agreement exists.
summary.zh: 中国针对光伏逆变器的强制性EMC标准包括：GB 17799.4-2022（工业环境传导和辐射骚扰发射，等同IEC 61000-6-4:2018）和GB/T 17799.2-2023（工业环境抗扰度，等同IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020），均由SAMR管理，构成CQC/CGC自愿性认证基准的组成部分。由于缅甸认可以IEC为基础的测试报告作为支持文件，针对国内CQC/CGC认证获取的现有IEC 61000系列测试报告在缅甸进口文件中具有实际使用价值，尽管双方之间不存在互认协议。
summary.zht: 中國針對光伏逆變器的強制性EMC標準包括：GB 17799.4-2022（工業環境傳導和輻射騷擾發射，等同IEC 61000-6-4:2018）和GB/T 17799.2-2023（工業環境抗擾度，等同IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020），均由SAMR管理，構成CQC/CGC自願性認證基準的組成部分。由於緬甸認可以IEC為基礎的測試報告作為支持文件，針對國內CQC/CGC認證獲取的現有IEC 61000系列測試報告在緬甸進口文件中具有實際使用價值，儘管雙方之間不存在互認協議。

standards_or_laws: GB 17799.4-2022 — EMC generic emissions, industrial environment (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-6-4:2018)
GB/T 17799.2-2023 — EMC generic immunity, industrial environment (recommended, IDT IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020)

gap.en: The gap is structural rather than technical: China has mandatory EMC obligations backed by SAMR enforcement; Myanmar has no equivalent mandatory EMC product law for PV inverters. Chinese exporters whose products already carry IEC 61000-series test reports (from CQC or CGC certification) are well-positioned — the same reports can serve as supporting import documentation in Myanmar. The residual gap is that Myanmar has no official conformity-mark acceptance list, so the importer must confirm with MIC and MEPE what specific documentation is currently accepted at the time of import.
gap.zh: 差距属于结构性而非技术性：中国有SAMR执行的强制性EMC义务；缅甸对光伏逆变器没有等同的强制性EMC产品法律。已持有IEC 61000系列测试报告（来自CQC或CGC认证）的中国出口商处于有利地位——相同报告可在缅甸作为进口支持文件使用。剩余差距在于缅甸没有官方合规标志接受清单，因此进口商须在进口时向MIC和MEPE确认当前接受的具体文件要求。
gap.zht: 差距屬於結構性而非技術性：中國有SAMR執行的強制性EMC義務；緬甸對光伏逆變器沒有等同的強制性EMC產品法律。已持有IEC 61000系列測試報告（來自CQC或CGC認證）的中國出口商處於有利地位——相同報告可在緬甸作為進口支持文件使用。剩餘差距在於緬甸沒有官方合規標誌接受清單，因此進口商須在進口時向MIC和MEPE確認當前接受的具體文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — no mandatory EMC product law identified for PV inverters in Myanmar as of access date. MIC may request IEC-based EMC test reports as import-permit supporting documentation on a case-by-case basis.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 17799.4-2022 for emissions). Recommended (GB/T 17799.2-2023 for immunity). Both are standard industry practice for CQC/CGC certification.

source.publisher: MSTRD — Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division, Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar imposes no mandatory EMC certification mark on imported PV inverters as of the access date. Existing IEC 61000-series test reports from Chinese CQC/CGC certification can serve as supporting import documentation. Confirm current MIC and MEPE documentation requirements with a qualified local agent before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至查询日期，缅甸对进口光伏逆变器没有强制性EMC认证标志要求。来自中国CQC/CGC认证的现有IEC 61000系列测试报告可作为进口支持文件使用。出货前请向合格的当地代理确认MIC和MEPE的现行文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至查詢日期，緬甸對進口光伏逆變器沒有強制性EMC認證標誌要求。來自中國CQC/CGC認證的現有IEC 61000系列測試報告可作為進口支持文件使用。出貨前請向合格的當地代理確認MIC和MEPE的現行文件要求。
